mapper.select: SELECT mi.media_id, mi.user_id, mi.album_id, mi.title, mi.media_type, mi.uploaded_at, mi.taken_at, a.album_name, u.display_name, medium_mv.storage_key AS medium_storage_key, small_mv.storage_key AS small_storage_key, thumb_mv.storage_key AS thumb_storage_key, preview_mv.storage_key AS preview_storage_key, original_mv.storage_key AS original_storage_key, original_mv.file_org_name AS original_file_name, original_mv.mime_type AS original_mime_type, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEDIA_LIKE ml WHERE ml.media_id = mi.media_id) AS like_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMENT c WHERE c.media_id = mi.media_id AND c.del_yn = 'N') AS comment_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEDIA_LIKE me WHERE me.media_id = mi.media_id AND me.user_id = #{userId}) AS liked_by_me, ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(COALESCE(t.tag_scope, 'N'), '|', t.tag_name) ORDER BY CASE WHEN t.tag_scope = 'P' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, t.tag_name SEPARATOR ',') FROM MEDIA_TAG mt JOIN TAG t ON mt.tag_id = t.tag_id WHERE mt.media_id = mi.media_id AND t.del_yn = 'N' ) AS tags_csv FROM MEDIA_ITEMS mi JOIN USER u ON mi.user_id = u.user_id JOIN ALBUM a ON mi.album_id = a.album_id LEFT JOIN MEDIA_VARIANT medium_mv ON mi.media_id = medium_mv.media_id AND medium_mv.variant_type = 'MEDIUM' LEFT JOIN MEDIA_VARIANT small_mv ON mi.media_id = small_mv.media_id AND small_mv.variant_type = 'SMALL' LEFT JOIN MEDIA_VARIANT thumb_mv ON mi.media_id = thumb_mv.media_id AND thumb_mv.variant_type = 'THUMB' LEFT JOIN MEDIA_VARIANT preview_mv ON mi.media_id = preview_mv.media_id AND preview_mv.variant_type = 'PREVIEW' LEFT JOIN MEDIA_VARIANT original_mv ON mi.media_id = original_mv.media_id AND original_mv.variant_type = 'ORIGINAL' WHERE mi.media_id = #{mediaId} AND mi.del_yn = 'N' AND u.del_yn = 'N' AND a.del_yn = 'N'

SELECT c.comment_id, c.media_id, c.parent_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.created_at, u.display_name FROM COMMENT c JOIN USER u ON c.user_id = u.user_id WHERE c.media_id = #{mediaId} AND c.del_yn = 'N' AND u.del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY c.created_at ASC, c.comment_id ASC

SELECT c.comment_id, c.media_id, c.parent_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.created_at, u.display_name FROM COMMENT c JOIN USER u ON c.user_id = u.user_id WHERE c.comment_id = #{commentId} AND c.del_yn = 'N' AND u.del_yn = 'N' LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMMENT ( comment_id, media_id, parent_id, user_id, content, created_at, del_yn ) VALUES ( #{commentId}, #{mediaId}, #{parentId}, #{userId}, #{content}, NOW(), 'N' )
INSERT INTO MEDIA_LIKE ( media_id, user_id, created_at ) VALUES ( #{mediaId}, #{userId}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO DOWNLOAD_LOG ( dl_id, user_id, media_id, download_at, ip_addr, user_agent, success_yn, fail_reason ) VALUES ( #{dlId}, #{userId}, #{mediaId}, NOW(), #{ipAddr}, #{userAgent}, #{successYn}, #{failReason} )
INSERT INTO MEDIA_TAG ( md_id, media_id, tag_id, created_at ) VALUES ( #{mdId}, #{mediaId}, #{tagId}, NOW() )
